---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

_What need does this feature address? Who feels the pain?_

## Proposed solution

_What would you build, at a high level? Keep it to outcomes; avoid pre-deciding implementation details unless they're load-bearing._

## Alternatives considered

_What other approaches did you think about? Why aren't they the right fit?_

## Scope

- [ ] This is in scope for the current `SPEC.md`
- [ ] This is a spec amendment (requires §amendments entry and owner approval — use the `spec-amendment` issue template for that instead)
- [ ] This is a future-release consideration, not current scope

## BFW compatibility

- [ ] Uses Eddie Design System (no custom CSS / non-Eddie UI framework)
- [ ] Uses `--ed-*` design tokens (no hardcoded values)
- [ ] Meets WCAG 2.1 AA baseline (or project's stricter target)
- [ ] Ships with tests
- [ ] Does not introduce a non-default dependency without explicit rationale

If any of the above is unchecked, explain below:

## Acceptance criteria

_How will we know this feature is done and working?_

-

## Related

_Link any related issues, PRs, or SPEC.md sections._
